description: Table actinfo du mod TCP (colonnes documentees via le D2R Data Guide).
source: Colonnes du .txt (mod TCP) ; types/descriptions du D2R Data Guide (guide/).

columns.name: act
columns.description: Defines the ID for the Act

columns.name: maxnpcitemlevel
columns.description: Controls the maximum item level for items sold by the NPC in the Act

columns.description: Uses an index to determine which wandering monster class to use when populating areas (

columns.name: wanderingnpcrange
columns.description: This is a modifier that gets added to the

columns.name: commonactcof
columns.description: Specifies which ".D2" file to use as for the common Act COF file. This is used to establish the seed when initializing the Act.

columns.name: wanderingMonsterPopulateChance
columns.description: The percent chance (from 0 to 100) to spawn a wandering monster (

columns.name: wanderingMonsterRegionTotal
columns.description: The maximum number of wandering monsters allowed at once

columns.name: wanderingPopulateRandomChance
columns.description: A secondary percent chance (from 0 to #) to determine whether to attempt populating with monsters. Only fails if random chance selects 0.
